prompt: Create a cinematic vertical close-up portrait of a young East Asian woman styled as an ethereal ancient Chinese beauty at night, framed from the chest upward and slightly off-center to the right. She has pale porcelain skin, delicate features, soft red lips, downcast eyes, and a calm melancholic expression, with one hand raised lightly to her chin showing long pale manicured nails. Her jet-black hair is long, voluminous, and loosely pinned up in a traditional-inspired style, with wispy strands falling across her face. Add one small red plum-blossom forehead ornament centered above her brows. She wears a shimmering silver-white silk hanfu robe with subtle floral jacquard embroidery, layered lapels, and a soft white inner garment. The background is very dark and blurred, with exactly one visible branch area of soft-focus white blossoms on the left side, suggesting moonlit plum flowers. Use cool blue moonlight, low-key lighting, glossy highlights on the silk, soft shadow modeling on the face, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, high-fashion fantasy photography, elegant Chinese historical drama aesthetic, vertical 9:16 composition, no text, no watermark, no modern accessories.
